title: AS 3600:2018 Reinforcement Lap Length
description: Calculate reinforcement development and lap length as per AS 3600:2018.

bar_diameter.description: Bar Diameter. Symbol: d_b. Units: mm. Reinforcement bar diameter in mm.

bar_end.description: Bar End. Symbol: End. Select between a straight, cogged or hooked bar end.

concrete_grade.description: f'c. Symbol: f'_c. Units: MPa. Concrete strength in MPa (max 65MPa as per AS 3600 Clause 13.1.2.2.)

reinforcement_grade.description: fsy. Symbol: f_{sy}. Units: MPa. Yield Strength of Reinforcing Bar. Standard deformed reinforcement (D500N) = 500MPa.

k1_coefficient.description: Concrete Below Bar (Horizontal Bars). Symbol: k_1. Units: mm. Used to calculate k1 coefficient as per AS 3600 Clause 13.1.2.2. Beam/slab top reinforcement often falls into the >300 category.

bundled_reinforcement.description: Bundled Reinforcement. Symbol: Bundling. Lap length for bundled reinforcement is increased as per AS 3600 Clause 13.1.7 & 13.2.5.

epoxy_coated_bar.description: Epoxy Coated Bar. Symbol: Epoxy. Factor to increase Lsy.tb as per AS 3600 Clause 13.1.2.2.

lightweight_concrete.description: Lightweight Concrete. Symbol: Lightweight. Factor to increase Lsy.tb as per AS 3600 Clause 13.1.2.2.

plain_bars.description: Plain (Round) Reinforcement. Symbol: Round \ Bar. Development length for plain (undeformed) bars is increased as per AS 3600 Clause 13.1.3 and 13.1.6.

development_plots.description: Development Plots. Select whether to plot change in stress development relative to lap / development length in report.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
